channel.title: admin on Aarush Gupta
channel.description: Recent content in admin on Aarush Gupta

item.description: I am a final year CS undergraduate at the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee. I am broadly in Deep Learning, with applications in Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing. At IIT Roorkee, I co-lead a Deep Learning-centric discussion group named the Vision and Language Group. Since May 2019, I have been working with the Visual Computing Group at Harvard University on Large-Scale Mitochondria Segmentation, as a part of the Connectomics Project.
